decoder_heading: What is the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)?
ident_heading: known as the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
heading_content_part: known as the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) came into effect. It is a comprehensive European data protection law that provides greater data rights for individuals which benefits all our users. Our Privacy Policy tells you how we look after, use and share the Personal Information that we collect from you and also how you can manage your consent; as well as action your rights. Please read this carefully. Unless we tell you or you agree, we do not share your Personal Information with anyone.

decoder_heading: What is the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)?
ident_heading: known as the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
heading_content_part: When you use any of our Services, you are agreeing to our Privacy Policy, but using the tools laid out in this policy you can manage your consent at any time. In terms of responsibility, Mind Candy Ltd is the ‘Data controller’.2. How do you protect my Personal Information?

decoder_heading: What is the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)?
ident_heading: known as the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
heading_content_part: We are serious about guarding the security of your Personal Information and use a secure server to store your Personal Information. However, like everyone else, we cannot guarantee complete security. We use industry-standard organisational and technical security measures to protect your data against unauthorised disclosure or processing.

decoder_heading: What is the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)?
ident_heading: known as the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
heading_content_part: Where you are required to choose a password for your account, you are responsible for keeping that password confidential. This means you should limit access to your computer or device and sign off after you have finished accessing your account. If you think someone has access to your password or unauthorised access to your account, please inform us immediately at support@moshikids.com.

decoder_heading: What is the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)?

heading_content_part: We are not responsible for the misuse of your account or information where you have not kept your password confidential or not reported a breach of security.3. decoder_heading: What is the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)?
ident_heading: known as the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
heading_content_part: Mind Candy may display targeted advertisements based on anonymised information, personally identifiable information or information you make publicly available, except for users within the EEA(EU) where we will seek consent to use personally identifiable information. This consent can be managed at anytime using the consent manager at the bottom of our websites or within the settings of your device or within our apps. No Personal Information will be provided to the advertiser directly by Mind Candy when you interact with or view a targeted advertisement. However, by interacting with or viewing an advertisement you are consenting to the possibility that the advertiser will collect data from you and/or make the assumption that you meet the targeting criteria used to display the advertisement.

heading_content_part: If you want to see, or change, your Personal Information, go to ‘my profile’ or your account settings or contact us at support@moshikids.com. Please note that certain information cannot be changed once you have entered it. For instance, there should be no reason for a user to change their date of birth, if inputted. This is to discourage users from engaging in unlawful activities.

How long do you keep my Personal Information for? How can I delete it?We store your Personal Information for as long as your account is active and for as long as is required solely for our business purposes. Data older than two years will be removed or anonymised. Web server logs are deleted after 30 days.

decoder_heading: What is the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)?
ident_heading: known as the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
heading_content_part: If you wish to delete an account, you can do so by following instructions within the relevant Service, and/or by contacting support@moshikids.com. If you wish to delete the Personal Information that we hold on you, you may do so by contacting us at support@moshikids.com. When you do this, we will deactivate your account and/or delete or anonymise (which means you cannot be identified from the information) relevant Personal Information, unless we have to retain it for legal reasons.
